_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: This cell line demonstrates sensitivity to ATR inhibition (AZD6738) in vitro while being resistant to temozolomide, a standard drug used in the treatment of high-grade glioma
details: Demonstrates sensitivity to ATR inhibition (AZD6738) in vitro while being resistant to temozolomide
